8 #ifndef NUMERICS_CONDITION_FOLDERENUMERATOR_H
9 #define NUMERICS_CONDITION_FOLDERENUMERATOR_H
10 /* Author : desrozis at Fri Apr 24 15:13:48 2015
11  * Generated by createNew
12  */
13 
14 #include "ArcGeoSim/Physics/Law2/Contribution/VariableFolder.h"
15 
16 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
17 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
18 
19 template<Law::ContainerKind::eType CK, Law::ItemKind::eType IK>
20 class FolderEnumerator
21 {
22 public:
23 
24  typedef Law::VariableFolder<CK,IK> Folder;
25 
26 public:
27 
28  FolderEnumerator(const Arcane::Array<Folder*>& folders,
29  const Arcane::StringArray& names)
30  : m_folders(folders)
31  , m_names(names)
32  , m_index(0)
33  {
34  ARCANE_ASSERT((folders.size() == names.size()),("folder and names size different"));
35  }
36 
37  FolderEnumerator(const FolderEnumerator& e)
38  : m_folders(e.m_folders)
39  , m_names(e.m_names)
40  , m_index(0) {}
41 
43  bool hasNext() const { return m_index != size(); }
44 
46  void operator++() { m_index ++; }
47 
49  const Folder& folder() const { return *(m_folders[m_index]); }
50 
51  Folder& folder() { return *(m_folders[m_index]); }
52 
53  Arcane::String name() const { return m_names[m_index]; }
54 
56  Arcane::Integer size() const { return m_folders.size(); }
57 
59  Arcane::Integer index() const { return m_index; }
60 
61 private:
62 
64  const Arcane::Array<Folder*>& m_folders;
65 
67  const Arcane::StringArray& m_names;
68 
70  Arcane::Integer m_index;
71 };
72

74 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
